title: pothos longus
intro: Pothos longus, also known as Devil's ivy, is a type of evergreen climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Pothos longus include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Pothos longus include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and even lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Pothos longus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
